title: archanthemis fruticulosa
intro: Archanthemis fruticulosa, also known as the mountain everlasting, is a perennial plant that belongs to the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Archanthemis fruticulosa include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
